languages.text: "Это не только вопрос дисциплины, Ваша Светлость". {n}Вивисектор говорит тихо, но уверенно, взвешивая каждое слово.{/n} "Это также вопрос репутации Сектора Бионика среди экипажа. И твердости установленных вами порядков".

traits.locale_text: "Это не только вопрос дисциплины, Ваша Светлость". {n}Хирургеон говорит тихо, но уверенно, взвешивая каждое слово.{/n} "Это также вопрос репутации Сектора Бионика среди экипажа. И твёрдости установленных вами порядков".

languages.text: "It is not just a question of discipline, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The Vivisector speaks quietly but confidently, weighing each word.{/n} "It is also a question of the Sector Bionica's standing among the crew. And the strength of the rules you have established."
languages.original_text: "Это не только вопрос дисциплины, Ваша Светлость". {n}Вивисектор говорит тихо, но уверенно, взвешивая каждое слово.{/n} "Это также вопрос репутации Сектора Бионика среди экипажа. И твердости установленных вами порядков".

traits.locale_text: "It is not just a question of discipline, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The Vivisector speaks quietly but confidently, weighing each word.{/n} "It is also a question of the Sector Bionica's standing among the crew. And the strength of the rules you have established."

"It is not just a question of discipline, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The chirurgeon speaks quietly but confidently, weighing each word.{/n} "It is also a question of the Sector Bionica's standing among the crew. And the strength of the rules you have established."

"It is not just a question of discipline, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The chirurgeon speaks quietly but confidently, weighing each word.{/n} "It is also a question of the Sector Bionica's standing among the crew. And the strength of the rules you have established."

"It is not just a question of discipline, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The Vivisector speaks quietly but confidently, weighing each word.{/n} "It is also a question of the Sector Bionica's standing among the crew. And the strength of the rules you have established."

languages.text: 「ただ規律の問題ではありません、御{mf|御殿|御嬢}様。」{n}外科医は静かに、しかし確信に満ちた口調で、言葉を重くしました。{/n}「セクター・ビオニカの乗組員としての地位、そして御{mf|御殿|御嬢}様が定めた規則の強さの問題でもあります」
languages.original_text: "It is not just a question of discipline, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The chirurgeon speaks quietly but confidently, weighing each word.{/n} "It is also a question of the Sector Bionica's standing among the crew. And the strength of the rules you have established."

languages.text: "Bu sadece bir disiplin meselesi değil {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri." {n}Dirikesimci, her kelimeyi tartarak sessiz ama kendinden emin bir şekilde konuşuyor.{/n} "Bu, aynı zamanda Sektör Biyonika'nın mürettebat nezdindeki itibarı ve koyduğunuz kuralların gücüyle de ilgili bir mesele."
languages.original_text: "It is not just a question of discipline, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The Vivisector speaks quietly but confidently, weighing each word.{/n} "It is also a question of the Sector Bionica's standing among the crew. And the strength of the rules you have established."

traits.locale_text: "Bu sadece bir disiplin meselesi değil {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri." {n}Dirikesimci, her kelimeyi tartarak sessiz ama kendinden emin bir şekilde konuşuyor.{/n} "Bu, aynı zamanda Sektör Biyonika'nın mürettebat nezdindeki itibarı ve koyduğunuz kuralların gücüyle de ilgili bir mesele."

languages.text: “大人，这不仅仅是纪律问题。”{n}解剖者字斟句酌，语调平静而坚定。{/n}“更关乎仿生区在全体船员心中的威信，以及您所立规章的效力。”
languages.original_text: "It is not just a question of discipline, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The Vivisector speaks quietly but confidently, weighing each word.{/n} "It is also a question of the Sector Bionica's standing among the crew. And the strength of the rules you have established."

traits.locale_text: “大人，这不仅仅是纪律问题。”{n}解剖者字斟句酌，语调平静而坚定。{/n}“更关乎仿生区在全体船员心中的威信，以及您所立规章的效力。”

languages.text: "Das ist nicht nur eine Frage der Disziplin, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}." {n}Der Vivisektor spricht leise aber selbstbewusst und wägt jedes seiner Worte ab.{/n} "Es ist auch eine Frage des Ansehens des Sektors Bionica bei der Crew. Und der Kraft der Regeln, die ihr etabliert habt."
languages.original_text: "It is not just a question of discipline, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The Vivisector speaks quietly but confidently, weighing each word.{/n} "It is also a question of the Sector Bionica's standing among the crew. And the strength of the rules you have established."

traits.locale_text: "Das ist nicht nur eine Frage der Disziplin, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}." {n}Der Vivisektor spricht leise aber selbstbewusst und wägt jedes seiner Worte ab.{/n} "Es ist auch eine Frage des Ansehens des Sektors Bionica bei der Crew. Und der Kraft der Regeln, die ihr etabliert habt."

languages.text: {n}Le vivisecteur répond d'un ton calme et empreint d'assurance, soupesant chacun de ses mots :{/n} « Plus qu'une simple question de discipline, Votre Seigneurie, c'est non seulement la réputation du secteur Bionica au sein de l'équipage qui est en jeu, mais aussi votre autorité, à travers les règles que vous avez vous-même édictées. »
languages.original_text: "It is not just a question of discipline, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The Vivisector speaks quietly but confidently, weighing each word.{/n} "It is also a question of the Sector Bionica's standing among the crew. And the strength of the rules you have established."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le vivisecteur répond d'un ton calme et empreint d'assurance, soupesant chacun de ses mots : {/n}« Plus qu'une simple question de discipline, Votre Seigneurie, c'est non seulement la réputation du secteur Bionica au sein de l'équipage qui est en jeu, mais aussi votre autorité, à travers les règles que vous avez vous-même édictées. »

languages.text: «No es solo cuestión de disciplina, mi{mf|lord|lady}». {n}El vivisector habla con voz queda pero confiada, sopesando cada palabra.{/n} «Es cuestión del estatus del Sector Bionica entre los tripulantes, y de la firmeza de las reglas que ha establecido usted».
languages.original_text: "It is not just a question of discipline, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The Vivisector speaks quietly but confidently, weighing each word.{/n} "It is also a question of the Sector Bionica's standing among the crew. And the strength of the rules you have established."

traits.locale_text: «No es solo cuestión de disciplina, mi{mf|lord|lady}». {n}El vivisector habla con voz queda pero confiada, sopesando cada palabra.{/n} «Es cuestión del estatus del Sector Bionica entre los tripulantes, y de la firmeza de las reglas que ha establecido usted».
